<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Cash Shot) / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$IPS$ = Income / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$IE$ = (Income + Cash Shot * Damage) / (Cash Shot * Damage)
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 600; 200; 650; 2400; 4250; 9750
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 3; ;
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Headshot Practice; Gold Shot; Deadly Precision; Double Tap II; Wildest Of The West
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 5523231844; 4999425200; 5523233366; 5523234030; 5523234990
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Golden Perks
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS is calculated as (Damage × Cash Shot) ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IREF$ = <ref name=ips>This is calculated as Income ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IEREF$ = <ref name=ie>Money generated per 1 damage is calculated as (Income + Cash Shot × Damage) ÷ (Cash Shot × Damage).</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Spin Time !! Cash Shot !! Income !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Income Per Second$IREF$ !! Income Efficiency$IEREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.9 || 2 || 6 || {{Money|35}} || 13 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.75 || 1.5 || 6 || {{Money|35}} || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.75 || 1.5 || 6 || {{Money|60}} || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.6 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|60}} || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.3 || 1.25 || 12 || {{Money|150}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}}  || 26 || 0.3 || 1 || 12 || {{Money|225}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|}
</div>
